title: BoneTorch (FABRIC)
description: Port of SBM-BoneTorch for Fabric, keeping the original functionality while ensuring full compatibility
body:
# BoneTorch - Fabric Port  

This is a **Fabric port** of the original **BoneTorch** mod by BuiltBroken, allowing players to experience its functionality on the Fabric mod loader.  

## Features  
- **Bone-Based Torches**: Craft and use torches made from bones, offering an alternative light source.  
- **Same Functionality as the Original**: Preserves the core mechanics of the original mod while ensuring compatibility with Fabric.  
- **Lightweight & Vanilla-Friendly**: Works seamlessly with other mods and does not impact performance.  

## Why Use This Mod?  
If you enjoyed the original **BoneTorch** mod on Forge, this Fabric port allows you to use it without needing Forge dependencies. Perfect for players looking to maintain the same gameplay experience on Fabric-based modpacks.  

## License & Attribution  
This project is licensed under the **MIT License**, following the original BoneTorch mod's licensing.  

Original BoneTorch mod by **BuiltBroken**:  
[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/BuiltBrokenModding/SBM-BoneTorch/tree/master)  

### Divergence from the Original  
This port includes the following modifications:  
- **Conversion to Fabric API**, making it compatible with Fabric-based environments.  
- **Code adjustments** to align with Fabric’s structure while keeping the mod functional.  
- **Potential future improvements** exclusive to this version.
